title: paeonia delavayi f. lutea
intro: Paeonia delavayi f. lutea, also known as the yellow peony, is a variety of the Paeonia delavayi plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the peony family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Paeonia delavayi f. lutea include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, due to its sedative and calming effects. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
